stories.title: Haldi, Tulsi, Adrak — Tere Ghar Ke Hidden Doctors
stories.description: Roz use hone wali 3 cheezein — par asli fayda tujhe pata hi nahi. Aaj yeh khud chillayenge sach!
stories.tags: health, ayurveda, immunity, haldi, tulsi, adrak, desi health, facts

modules.video_generation_prompt: मैं हल्दी हूँ सूजन कम करती शरीर में करक्यूमिन नामक तत्व पचास प्रतिशत तक दर्द घटाता तू बस स्वाद समझता साले नजरअंदाज करेगा तो जोड़ों में सूजन बढ़ेगी
modules.image_generation_prompt: A bright yellow turmeric root with angry scrunched eyes, tiny nose, two small hands with one aggressively pointing forward and two stubby legs spread wide, full body visible, mouth open screaming, leaning forward intensely toward viewer. The turmeric root stands inside a traditional Indian kitchen beside a steel glass filled with turmeric milk, wooden spice box open showing vibrant powders, scattered raw haldi roots on stone slab, morning sunlight entering through window highlighting kitchen textures vividly. Warm golden morning light with rich yellow and orange tones dominating, creating a vibrant Pixar-style saturated palette. Eye-level confrontation camera angle capturing full body of the turmeric pointing directly at milk glass. Viewer feels shocked and exposed, as if caught ignoring something powerful in their own kitchen, intense confrontation energy from inside the turmeric's natural environment.

modules.video_generation_prompt: मैं तुलसी हूँ रोज तेरे सामने थी एंटीऑक्सिडेंट शरीर की रोग प्रतिरोधक क्षमता तीस प्रतिशत तक बढ़ाते तू सिर्फ पूजा करता गधे सेवन नहीं करेगा तो जल्दी बीमार पड़ेगा
modules.image_generation_prompt: A fresh green tulsi plant with angry scrunched eyes, tiny nose, two expressive hands with one jabbing toward viewer and two stubby legs planted wide, full body visible, mouth open shouting loudly, leaning forward in confrontation. The tulsi stands in a home courtyard near a small temple platform, diya burning beside it, incense smoke rising, morning prayer setting with bells and flowers scattered naturally. Soft golden sunrise lighting mixed with green tones dominating scene in a vibrant Pixar-like palette. Low-angle up-shot making tulsi look powerful and dominant as it points toward viewer. Viewer feels guilt and realization, like they ignored something sacred and powerful in daily life, intense emotional confrontation from within its own natural spiritual environment.

modules.video_generation_prompt: मैं अदरक हूँ तेरी चाय में छिपा जिंजरोल बैक्टीरिया मारता पाचन तेज करता रोज पीता है पर समझता नहीं बेवकूफ गलत खाएगा तो पेट खराब रहेगा
modules.image_generation_prompt: A rough brown ginger root in extreme close-up with furious scrunched eyes, tiny nose, two small hands with one stabbing toward camera and two stubby legs barely visible, full body squeezed in frame, mouth wide open screaming intensely. The ginger is inside a boiling chai pan on a gas stove, bubbles rising, tea leaves swirling, steam covering scene dramatically in a real Indian kitchen setup. Strong warm lighting from stove flame with orange and brown tones dominating in saturated Pixar style. Extreme close-up angle filling frame with ginger’s furious face. Viewer feels attacked and exposed, like being called out directly by something inside their own chai, intense meme-worthy confrontation.

modules.video_generation_prompt: याद रख — करक्यूमिन सूजन घटाता, तुलसी प्रतिरोधक क्षमता बढ़ाती, जिंजरोल पाचन सुधारता. अगर हमसे कोई ज्ञान मिला तो ठोक दे लाइक बटन और फॉलो कर ले।
modules.image_generation_prompt: All three characters turmeric, tulsi, and ginger together with angry scrunched eyes, tiny noses, two hands each pointing and gesturing, stubby legs wide apart, full bodies visible, all leaning forward shouting at viewer in unity. They stand in a lively Indian kitchen courtyard hybrid environment combining spice box, tulsi plant corner, and chai stove together naturally. Bright mixed warm lighting with yellow green and brown tones creating vibrant Pixar palette. Slight rotating camera angle capturing all three in powerful formation. Viewer feels overwhelmed and confronted by combined truth, like all daily ignored items are shouting together from their own world demanding attention.
